content.en:
"The Huoyang True Sect has fallen a peak realm god, and for such a long time, it has never attacked the human race. "

Ye Tian recalled this and suddenly had some doubts.

But after thinking about it, maybe the peak realm god of the Huoyang True Sect was also afraid that he would be killed by that unknown powerhouse, in case it was really done by the peak realm god who was related to the human race, it would be very dangerous to deal with the human race.

Therefore, it is reasonable that the Huoyang True Sect does not dare to attack the human race.

"That's fine, the Huoyang True Sect doesn't deal with the human race, and the human race can develop normally. After a long time, even if I don't need to make a move, I don't need to worry about the retaliation of the Fire Yang True Sect!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Huoyang True Sect.

The god of the Saya Realm is chatting with an illusory figure.

This phantom is another peak realm god "Three Six Zero", but its strength is much stronger than that of the Saya realm god.

"I've seen the gods of the Sumeru realm!"

The god of the Saya realm was very polite.

After all, this Sumeru Realm God is the pinnacle of the supreme power, not only is his strength stronger than him, but his identity and status are not comparable to him.

Therefore, he didn't dare to snub this Sumeru realm god.

The Sumeru Realm God said: "Saya Realm God, your Huoyang True Sect has fallen a peak realm god, and now the hope of becoming a supreme force has been lowered again!"

Regarding the ridicule of the gods of the Sumeru realm, the gods of the Saya realm did not dare to say anything, so they could only nod slightly.

Immediately, the Sumeru Realm God said again: "Saya Realm God, there is an opportunity at present, I don't know if your Huoyang True Sect is willing to send a high-level Realm God over, or you can go over yourself." "

"What chance?"

The Saya Realm God showed interest.

Sumeru Realm Divine Dao: "Not long ago, our Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace found a mysterious treasure in the Void of Death, which contains a lot of opportunities, if you get some opportunities casually, so that a high-level peak realm god has the hope of being promoted to a peak realm god, if your Huoyang True Sect is lucky, it is not impossible to give birth to two peak realm gods." "

The Saya Realm God was not excited, but frowned slightly.

"Sumeru Realm God, you don't have to fool me, if there is really such a good place, your Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace will give us the opportunity?" The Shaya Realm God asked rhetorically: "That mysterious treasure land is afraid that it is dangerous and invincible, and even high-level peak realm gods will almost die if they enter." So, you want to use our high-level realm gods of the Fire Yang True Sect as cannon fodder!"

The god of the Sumeru realm smiled and said, "Okay, it's really dangerous there, but I didn't completely fool you, there are indeed a lot of good things there, and even I want to enter there." But alas, I couldn't get in. "

"Can't you get in? Didn't you say before that I could go there in person, then there should be no restriction on the peak realm gods!"

The god of the Saya realm was puzzled.

"Yes, it is true that there is no restriction on the peak realm god, at most let the strength of the peak realm god be suppressed. But that treasure place restricts extra-dimensional things, and any peak realm god who has fused with extra-dimensional things can't enter that place, and I've tried it, but I can't enter. The Sumeru Realm God explained.

"Can't the pinnacle realm god who has fused with extra-dimensional things enter?" the Saya realm god guessed, "Could it be that there is an incomparably powerful extra-dimensional thing in that treasure land, and that extra-dimensional thing excludes all other extra-dimensional things?"

"There's this possibility. Sumeru Realm God said: "Therefore, it can only be entered by those peak realm gods or high-level realm gods who have not fused with extradimensional things." The reason why it is recommended for high-level realm gods to go in is because high-level realm gods are too weak and will most likely not cause an attack by extradimensional creatures. And when the peak realm god enters, it is easy to be perceived by extradimensional creatures. "

This explanation is easy.

It's like an ordinary person who only cares about other people, where will he care about ants walking underground.

And extra-dimensional creatures are such creatures, they almost don't care about too weak creatures, and the peak realm gods are qualified to make these extra-dimensional creatures care.

"What, extradimensional creatures were born in that treasure land!!!"

The face of the Saya Realm God changed.

Extradimensional beings are such powerful beings, they are born to control extradimensional powers.

Of course, this is not to say that extradimensional beings are born with the power of extradimensionality, but because extradimensional beings contain a certain substance in their bodies, which is equivalent to extradimensional things, which allows them to control the power of extradimensionality. []

If they lose this substance, they will not be able to control the extradimensional power0 .....

Therefore, they are still far from truly controlling the power of the extradimensional.

But extradimensional creatures are extradimensional creatures, and the weakest extradimensional creatures are comparable to the pinnacle realm gods who have condensed ten eternal realm spirits.

The god of the Saya Realm is very aware of his strength, at most he can deal with weaker extra-dimensional creatures, and some powerful extra-dimensional creatures are terrifying beings who can kill him in seconds.

That's why he was so scared when he heard about extradimensional creatures.

The Sumeru Realm God smiled and said, "Saya Realm God, don't be so afraid, the extradimensional creatures in that place are not very powerful. Of course, with your strength, if you go in, it will indeed be very dangerous. Therefore, it is best to send a high-level realm god in. In this way, as long as the luck is not very bad, but you don't want to find extradimensional creatures, you still have a chance to survive. Just find some resource treasures, and you can come out. "

The Shaya Realm God quickly regained his composure and said, "Sumeru Realm God, there are many high-level realm gods in your Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace, why don't you let them in? "

"It's very simple, many of our high-level realm gods in Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace think that they have a high chance of breaking through to the peak realm gods, and they don't want to take risks. After all, once you enter that treasure land, as long as you encounter extradimensional creatures, the high-level realm gods will definitely die. So, none of them want to bet on the odds. The Sumeru Realm God explained.

The god of the Saya Realm was stunned, and 4.9 didn't know what to say.

The high-level realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace spare their lives, and the high-level realm gods of the Huoyang True Sect don't spare their lives?

However, the high-level realm gods of the Huoyang True Sect had almost no chance of impacting the peak realm gods, and this was indeed a big chance.

If he comes back alive, maybe he will have the hope of breaking through to the peak realm god realm in the future, and in that case, the strength of the Huoyang True Sect will also be able to skyrocket.

"Sumeru Realm God, I need to think about it. "

The god of the Saya realm said.

"Yes, but I will continue to invite high-level realm gods among the other top forces. If you agree, please contact me. Of course, say it in advance, any high-level realm god who comes out needs to pay half of the resource treasures. "

Sumeru realm Shinto.
